summary: Iteration 10 testing completed successfully. Verified refactored modular routes (server.py split into routes/ and daemons/ directories) and enhanced Autonomous Portfolios UI with tabbed Holdings/Rebalance History panels. 17/17 backend tests passed. All 6 portfolios now active (6/6). Frontend UI fully functional with tabbed interface per portfolio.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: 'ok', service: 'BMIA'}
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/overview - returns 6/6 portfolios active, total_capital=300L
Backend: GET /api/portfolios - returns portfolios list with 6 strategies
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/bespoke_forward_looking - returns portfolio with 10 holdings
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/rebalance-log-all/recent - returns logs array
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/rebalance-log/quick_entry - returns logs array
Backend: GET /api/symbols - returns symbol list
Backend: GET /api/symbols/nifty50 - returns 50 NIFTY symbols
Backend: GET /api/sectors - returns sectors list
Backend: GET /api/market/cockpit - returns cached cockpit data
Backend: GET /api/signals/active - returns active signals list
Backend: GET /api/signals/history - returns signal history
Backend: GET /api/signals/track-record - returns track record
Backend: GET /api/signals/alerts - returns alerts array
Backend: GET /api/guidance/stats - returns guidance stats
Backend: GET /api/bse/gainers - returns BSE gainers
Backend: GET /api/bse/advance-decline - returns advance decline data
Frontend: Portfolio page loads with 'Autonomous Portfolios' title
Frontend: All 6 portfolio cards visible (bespoke_forward_looking, quick_entry, long_term, swing, alpha_generator, value_stocks)
Frontend: Global summary shows Total Capital (300L), Current Value (299.6L), Active (6/6)
Frontend: Clicking portfolio card expands with Holdings and Rebalance History tabs
Frontend: Holdings tab shows stock table with Stock, Entry, Current, Qty, P&L, Weight, Rationale columns
Frontend: Holdings table displays 10 stocks with entry price, current price, quantity, weight, rationale
Frontend: Rebalance History tab shows empty state message 'No rebalancing activity yet'
Frontend: Portfolio Thesis section displays at bottom of expanded holdings
Frontend: Refresh button visible and functional
test_credentials: No auth required. LLM key configured in backend/.env as EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
seed_data_creation: All 6 portfolios are now active with 10 stocks each (~₹50L per portfolio). Total capital 300L, current value 299.6L.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified refactored modular architecture. server.py is now slim entry point (~90 lines) with routes split into: routes/portfolios.py, routes/signals.py, routes/market.py, routes/analysis.py, routes/guidance.py, routes/bse.py, routes/symbols.py. Daemons in: daemons/evaluation_scheduler.py, daemons/market_cache.py. All 6 portfolios now active (value_stocks completed construction since iteration 9). Watchlist.js has tabbed UI per portfolio with Holdings tab (stock table) and Rebalance History tab (SwapCard components for rebalancing events). No rebalancing has occurred yet - AI evaluates daily after market close (4-6 PM IST).

refactored_architecture.details: server.py reduced from ~1200 lines to ~90 lines. Routes modularized into APIRouter modules. All endpoints working identically.

frontend_tabbed_ui.details: Portfolio cards expand with tabbed interface. Holdings tab shows stock table with all columns. Rebalance History tab shows empty state or SwapCard components.

all_portfolios_active.details: 6/6 portfolios now active (value_stocks completed since iteration 9). Each has 10 holdings.
